name: Absurdism
tagline: The universe is silent. Live fully anyway — that is the revolt.
summary: Absurdism names the gap between our hunger for meaning and a universe that offers none. Camus refused both suicide and false hope; the third option is to keep living, lucidly, in defiance of the silence.

quotes.text: In the depth of winter, I found an invincible summer.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

quotes.text: The absurd is the essential concept and the first truth.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

quotes.text: There is no sun without shadow. Know the night.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

modern_echoes: stand-up comedy and absurdist meme culture
